# Disclaimer

**Last updated:** March 2026

This document describes how Mulib is offered and what it does **not** promise. **It is not legal advice.** Laws differ by country and situation. If you need advice about your own conduct or liability, consult a qualified attorney.

**No written disclaimer can guarantee that you (or anyone) will never face a legal claim.** The sections below set expectations for this project only.

---

## Purpose and nature of this project

Mulib is offered as an **educational and technical** project: a **testbed** and **demonstration** of how **local-first music software** could work—search, metadata, organizing files on disk, and a desktop UI—so developers and curious users can see **how a real music app might be structured** without tying it to a commercial product.

It is intended for **learning**, **experimentation**, and **testing** (for example exploring UX and workflows with **content you have the right to use**). It is **not** presented as a commercial streaming or download service, **not** a replacement for licensed music products, and **not** an invitation to use third-party content in ways you are not allowed to.

**This description of intent does not waive your legal duties** or the rules of any platform. It only explains what the project is meant to illustrate. If your use goes beyond lawful testing or personal experimentation you are authorized to perform, **that remains your responsibility** (see below).

---

## Music and media downloads (read this)

Mulib is **software you run on your own computer**. Like many tools, it **may be used in lawful ways or in ways that violate law or third-party rules**. The authors and contributors **do not control what you do** with the app.

**You alone decide** what you search for, download, keep, or share. **You are solely responsible** for that conduct and for any consequences, including civil or criminal liability where the law applies.

In many jurisdictions, **downloading or copying copyrighted music (or other media) without permission** from the rightsholder or without another valid legal basis **may be unlawful** and may also **violate the terms** of streaming or hosting services (for example YouTube / YouTube Music). **Nothing in this repository authorizes infringement** or grants you any license to third-party content.

The project is **not** offered as a way to obtain pirated or unlicensed material. **Do not use Mulib to break the law or breach terms you have agreed to.** If you are unsure whether your use is allowed, **do not download** until you have clarified your rights (for example: you own the content, you have a license, or your jurisdiction permits the specific use).

**The authors, copyright holders, and contributors of Mulib:**

- **Do not** encourage, solicit, or endorse any illegal downloading or copyright infringement
- **Do not** monitor, vet, or approve your use of the Software
- **Are not** a party to your relationship with any platform, label, or rightsholder
- **Are not responsible** for claims, losses, fines, or legal action arising from **your** use of the Software or **your** handling of any content

If you do not accept sole responsibility for your use of Mulib and any media you obtain with it, **do not use this Software.**
